title: Spicy Shattering Syrian Chicken Tagine
description: A spicy and flavorful Syrian dish made with chicken, cajun spices, and a hint of wine, cooked in a claypot to perfection. This high-protein friendly dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the cajun spice mix, salt, and pepper.
Add the chicken thighs to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mix.
Heat the olive oil in the claypot over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion to the claypot and cook until it starts to caramelize.
Add the minced garlic to the claypot and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken thighs to the claypot and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the red wine, chicken broth, and dried apricots to the claypot.
Cover the claypot with a lid and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for 30 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened.
